title: LEXYPEXY
excerpt: Jack was so kindly gifted one of these adorable wooden teethers from Lexy Pexy at the Boom Boom Room event . We love how they are handcrafted out of sustainable Vermont Maple wood. The wood is non-splintering, naturally anti-bacterial, non-allergenic…
body:
Jack was so kindly gifted one of these adorable wooden teethers from Lexy Pexy at the Boom Boom Room event. We love how they are handcrafted out of sustainable Vermont Maple wood. The wood is non-splintering, naturally anti-bacterial, non-allergenic and non-toxic. And their styles are absolutely adorable. We loved meeting the sweet owners, Lex and Martin.

Here's what Lex, had to say: "We fell in love with Jack at first fist bump, which throughout the day became a fist bump explosion, (I will take credit for that). Such a sweetie he clung on while we drew on the floor together and he only tried to eat the chalk once. I could seriously snuggle that baby to pieces!" And Jack loved the cuddles and hanging out too, thanks for the sweet shades, Lexypexy!
